first_eight_rollout_policy.downstream_gates_trusted_after: refreshed rolling-caption rough proof receives human keep, then final assembly keep, then publish-readiness keep

caption_context.placement: middle two-thirds of fixed right rail
caption_context.displayed_caption_source: script-locked cue text from locked narration script; ASR/timed text is timing-only
caption_context.final_render_behavior: burn visible rail captions into video frame after human keep
caption_context.publish_sidecar_behavior: preserve approved VTT sidecar for YouTube upload

full_timeline.embedded_caption_sample_policy: proof injects script-locked display chunks into the predecessor rough proof; full caption script match must be refreshed before keep

key_phrase_spans.phrase_text: law was measuring the wrong thing
They began with a category
Titanic was far beyond the world
the world changes around it
table had stopped tracking the scale
law did not say, count the people
old rule had a simpler answer ready
minimum into a signal of adequacy
rulebook was the smaller imagination
safety system would have had to think
reduced that system to a table
smaller version of the risk
law had turned scale into a category
A mature safety system does not pick
Then the proof arrives all at once
question was no longer just
failure was already present in the table
category built for yesterday's ship
law had stopped measuring the ships
reality audits the system

living_cover_cue_map.missing_reviewed_key_phrase_span_policy: suppress highlight rendering and keep packet pending/tighten until authored reviewed spans exist
living_cover_cue_map.draft_key_phrase_span_policy: draft spans may render in rough review only and remain pending human keep before final/publish gates
living_cover_cue_map.render_policy: internal production artifact only; no visible cue-map cards or diagnostic labels

rail_behavior.viewer_text_boundary: all viewer-facing story/chapter/caption/effect/end-screen text stays inside fixed right rail unless a human-approved override scopes another surface

rolling_caption_window.placement: middle two-thirds of fixed right rail
rolling_caption_window.source: script-locked cue chunks with timing-only ASR/VTT/SRT alignment
rolling_caption_window.motion: single translateY as deterministic continuous audio/render-time function

end_screen_context.rolling_caption_end_screen_policy: YouTube placeholders fade in during the final caption exit and are fully visible when final caption text is suppressed

next_review_question: Review the final MP4 assembly and reply with exactly one disposition: keep, tighten, or reject.

youtube_upload_request.reason: Final MP4 has been created for review. Long-form gate requires publish-readiness package keep and explicit upload approval before YouTube upload.

titanic_outro_level_blocker.reason: Titanic selected review mix preserves the pre-existing quiet outro; legal-window outro is below the approved post-VO outro level standard.
titanic_outro_level_blocker.current_guard_failure: prior guard only checked selected-audio hash preservation and clipping; it did not compare outro loudness to the standard threshold.
titanic_outro_level_blocker.recommended_delta: apply Challenger-approved +5 dB post-VO ramp pattern to Titanic only, then create HTML review before any MP4 render

html_human_keep_record.approval_text: Render the other episodes as well and publish them to YouTube.
html_human_keep_record.approved_scope: current legal-timed borderless source-credit gap outro-level successor HTML review; open MP4 render gate only

human_keep_record.approval_text: Render the other episodes as well and publish them to YouTube.
human_keep_record.approved_scope: current legal-timed borderless source-credit gap outro-level successor HTML review; open MP4 render gate only

final_assembly_human_keep_record.approval_text: Render the other episodes as well and publish them to YouTube.
final_assembly_human_keep_record.approved_scope: current rendered MP4 assembly; open publish-readiness gate for unlisted YouTube review upload only

post_render_read_normalization.reason: Normalize stale tighten reads where later browser/render QA passed and borderless/static legal end-screen behavior is intentional.
